name: §2.27 artifact declares the current_phase field per the contract schema
command: H13_ARTIFACT_DIR=art bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/agent-continuity.sh" --write --session-id s --parent-session-id p --parent-cl-id c --current-phase Phase-E --context-summary mid --next-action go --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("art/s.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.current_phase==="Phase-E"?0:1)' && echo ok 1>&2
